meta.phase-name: Visual composer inline editing and publish workflow

problem.item: Once the builder shell is coherent, the preview still needs to become the primary interactive surface instead of a passive rendering beside forms.
Selection, hover actions, inline text editing, responsive preview behavior, and publish validation are all necessary to make the composer feel like a modern no-code builder.

goals.goal: Make preview interaction first-class with mirrored selection between preview and Structure.
Ship MVP inline editing for headings, paragraph text, and CTA labels.
Keep draft creation/switching lightweight and integrated into the working-page model.
Improve Publish so validation is actionable, page status is clear, and errors can point back to affected blocks.
Support desktop, tablet, and mobile preview modes without mutating content state.

non-goals.item: Do not tackle full reusable-block reference management or deep dynamic/container behavior here; that is phase 17.
Do not add every inline-editable field type in this phase.

definition-of-done.item: Clicking blocks in preview and Structure keeps selection synchronized.
Preview hover shows outline and direct quick actions.
Supported text fields can be edited inline and stay synchronized with Content state.
Draft/page switching and create-draft flow remain compact and reliable.
Publish shows page status, changed-block count, and actionable validation summary.

tasks.task: Implement the mirrored selection model across preview and Structure, including selected-block outline behavior.
Add preview hover UI and direct block actions such as add above/below, duplicate, delete, and hide/show where appropriate.
Ship inline preview editing for MVP text fields and keep Content-tab forms synchronized.
Refine draft lifecycle and working-page switching so draft context stays clean when creating or switching pages.
Improve Publish with validation summary, changed-block count, and page-level workflow state.
Add responsive preview-mode controls and verification for preview parity plus inline-editing flows.
